hero.title: Miguel Dacal
hero.tagline: From ad click to booked appointment — AI automation and paid growth, end to end.
hero.bio: Production AI automation and paid acquisition for SMBs and indie products. WhatsApp bots with n8n + RAG, voice agents with Vapi, multi-phase pipelines with Claude and Gemini. Currently building my own SaaS.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a self-taught builder shipping production AI automation. Before that, I spent 15 years as a tenured civil servant in Spain — then deliberately walked away in 2020 to reinvent myself. Sixteen months in Sydney to build my English foundation, a Higher Vocational Diploma in software development, and since 2024 I've been full-time on AI systems and growth.
about.p2: Today I run my own end-to-end practice — WhatsApp bots, voice AI agents, ad pipelines, paid funnels — while building a viral content research SaaS solo. Certified Implementer for AI Automation by Dania.ai. I care about systems that actually ship and survive contact with production.
about.statusValue: Open to work · Open to freelance

projects.title: Selected projects
projects.sub: Production work and what I'm currently shipping.

p1.title: Viral Content Research SaaS
p1.desc: Solo founder. A SaaS that detects viral patterns across YouTube and automates the full research workflow: source analysis, strategy, script and storyboard generation.
p1.tags: FastAPI · Supabase + pgvector · Celery · Redis · Next.js · Multi-agent · Claude Code

p2.title: WhatsApp Lead Qualification Bot
p2.desc: Production bot that qualifies inbound leads end-to-end and books qualified appointments in Cal.com with zero human intervention.
p2.tags: n8n · WhatsApp Business API · RAG · Cal.com

p3.title: Voice AI Booking Agent
p3.desc: Voice agent built with Vapi + RAG over private knowledge bases. Handles inbound calls, qualifies, and books appointments without a human in the loop.

p4.title: Multi-phase Ad Generation Pipeline
p4.desc: End-to-end pipeline for ad creatives: competitor ad scraping → visual analysis → script generation → video output. Fully automated.
p4.tags: Apify · Gemini Vision · Claude · Veo 3 · n8n

p5.title: End-to-end Paid Acquisition Funnels
p5.desc: Two full sales funnels delivered: landing page, Google Ads campaigns, GTM tracking, GA4 dashboards, audience segmentation, keyword research and creative iteration.
p5.tags: Google Ads · GTM · GA4 · WordPress · Paid Media
